rulings.Case Title: JOHN COYLE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 15, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Keenan Properties, Inc.¿ motion for summary judgment: Hearing required. The hearing is at 1:30 p.m. The court will inquire about the status of the deposition for which the hearing was continued. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL SHROPSHIRE et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Reconsider Order Denying Defendants Motion For Summary Judgment [Ccp 1008(A)]
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 15, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant O¿Connor Lumber Company¿s motion for reconsideration is granted, but, upon reconsideration, the court re-affirms the denial of defendant¿s motion reconsideration. The testimony of Mr. Shropshire, Mr. Wellington, Mr. Dowds and Mr. Lewis create a triable issue whether Mr. Shropshire was exposed to asbestos-containing FixAll attributable to defendant. Defendant is deemed to contest the tentative ruling. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: FLOYD CZARNICK et al VS. ALLIED PACKING et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 15, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Foster Wheeler LLC¿s motion for summary judgment: Hearing required. The hearing is at 9:00 a.m. The parties should be prepared to argue the legal issue of whether a manufacturer of boilers who supplies boilers without any asbestos-containing insulation but specifies that asbestos-containing insulation be used with the boilers can be liable for a person¿s exposure to the asbestos-containing insulation that it specified. = (220/HEK)
